title: HotbarLoader
description: Save and load hotbars in Survival with customizable keybind combos (e.g. H + J to save, K + J to load). Missing items are simply skipped.
body:
HotbarLoader lets you quickly save your current hotbar and restore it later—no menus, no commands.                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  **Features**                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  - Two fully configurable keybinds: Save Hotbar and Load Hotbar (change them in Minecraft’s Controls menu)                                                                                                                         
  - Pick a hotbar preset by pressing a second key: e.g. H + 1 or H + J to save, K + 1 or K + J to load                                                                                                                              
  - When loading, only uses items that actually exist in your inventory (missing items are skipped)                                                                                                                                 
  - If the same item appears multiple times, it prefers the largest available stacks and tries to consolidate them into a full stack when possible                                                                                  
  - Client-side storage (per installation), no server mod required                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  **How to use**                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  - Save: hold your save key and press a second key (e.g. H + 1 / H + J)                                                                                                                                                            
  - Load: hold your load key and press the same second key (e.g. K + 1 / K + J)                                                                                                                                                     
  - Note: Loading only works when no GUI is open and your cursor stack is empty.                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  **Compatibility**                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  - Fabric, client-only                                                                                                                                                                                                             
  - Minecraft 1.21.x (this project is currently set up for 1.21.11)
